title: English Eva manga Vol 9 out in October
display_title: English Eva manga Vol 9 out in October
wikitext:
[]: English Eva manga Vol. 9 out in October             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Mon Sep 27, 2004 1:12 pm This is a little sudden, perhaps, but it was announced at the Evangelion panel at last weekend's Anime Weekend Atlanta that Vol. 9 of the Evangelion manga by Yoshiyuki Sadamoto will be released in English by Viz in October. Eva Vol. 9 will be released in the same size and design format as the recent Vols. 1-8, unflopped with the original Japanese sound FX, and will include commentary by Yoshiyuki Sadamoto as well as an original essay on Kaworu Nagisa and the controversial differences between the character as written for the anime and as written for the manga. --C.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Mon Sep 27, 2004 1:36 pm That's cool,will it be online available the same time?

[]:             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Mon Sep 27, 2004 1:42 pm the_seventh_child wrote: That's cool,will it be online available the same time?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Sep 27, 2004 2:21 pm Wow. That's awesome news. Its good to hear I won't have to wait till next summer to read it in English, as has been the case the last couple years. http://www.rightstuf.com/cgi-bin/catalogmgr/NKlCZD8DmDYRPkRr63/browse/item/64158/4/0/0 RighStuf lists the release as being in November. Is their release date accurate? Hey Carl, what are the chances of getting a review copy?

[]:             Quote Post by RubberSoul » Mon Sep 27, 2004 11:42 pm Oh, happy day!

[]:             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Thu Sep 30, 2004 2:09 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Wow. That's awesome news. Its good to hear I won't have to wait till next summer to read it in English, as has been the case the last couple years. http://www.rightstuf.com/cgi-bin/catalogmgr/NKlCZD8DmDYRPkRr63/browse/item/64158/4/0/0 RighStuf lists the release as being in November. Is their release date accurate? Hey Carl, what are the chances of getting a review copy?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Oct 01, 2004 3:50 pm Carl Horn wrote: I'll see about a review copy--of course, I'm usually the last to get them myself (even at the publisher, advance copies are hard to come by early--almost everything is going to the stores and the warehouses...which is where, of course, you mainly want it).

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Fri Oct 01, 2004 4:10 pm Of course you are, Aaron <3

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Oct 01, 2004 10:55 pm God I love flunkies. 8)

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Sat Oct 02, 2004 2:57 am Well this news is quite relieving. I, too, was afraid I'd have to wait another 3 years to get a translation. (It happened to me with vol. 8, before. A friend had it for a whole year and a half before it was brought here. T_T )

[]:             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Sat Oct 02, 2004 1:38 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Carl Horn wrote: I'll see about a review copy--of course, I'm usually the last to get them myself (even at the publisher, advance copies are hard to come by early--almost everything is going to the stores and the warehouses...which is where, of course, you mainly want it).

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sat Oct 02, 2004 2:02 pm Carl Horn wrote: Don't worry; as soon as I get a copy (which may be no sooner than it comes into my local shop), I'll send it to you. You and Matt Greenfield. How's that?

[]:             Quote Post by Ayanami » Sun Oct 03, 2004 3:58 pm So does this mean us non-Japanese-reading, non-scanlation-downloading people can finally see Kaworu eat a kitten (or whatever made you Kaworu fangirls go crazy over)?

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Sun Oct 03, 2004 4:31 pm Don't forget the Kaworu fanboys! SADAMOTO IS A KITTEN KILLER! Heh... I actually have the 9th volume already, but I can't read it a darn word of it. :(

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sun Oct 03, 2004 10:07 pm I don't know why the Kaoru fangirls are so upset. Killing small furry things is sexy. 8) Isn't it? :shock: Isn't it? :oops:

[]:             Quote Post by Tailgunner » Sun Oct 03, 2004 10:11 pm CD-ROM versions of manga adding voices, sound FX, etc

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Mon Oct 04, 2004 5:43 am Hexon.Arq wrote: I don't know why the Kaoru fangirls are so upset. Killing small furry things is sexy. 8) Isn't it? :shock: Isn't it? :oops:

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Oct 04, 2004 2:24 pm Hexon.Arq wrote: I don't know why the Kaoru fangirls are so upset. Killing small furry things is sexy. 8) Isn't it? :shock: Isn't it? :oops:

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat Oct 23, 2004 5:47 pm Has the english version been released yet or not? I have been to a couple stores (Borders, Barnes & Nobles) and both of them told me they only have up to 8. Just need to know before I decide to trek to a real anime and manga store. Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by Senpuken » Wed Nov 24, 2004 5:43 pm So November is nearing its end, and Volume 9 hasn't been released in English anywhere around here. Has it been elsewhere? Also, has there been a release date for a new version of Volume 8? I'd rather all my books look appropriate together and not have that one stand out with it's larger size.
